# FAQ — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

Common questions from LLOs and FLWs.

## Vendor interaction

**Q: A vendor asks me if their turmeric has lead. What do I say?**
Do not confirm or deny. Tell them: "I can't test for that — our job is
just to take a photo and record information. Lab testing is what
actually tells you." Point them to the education-message framing.

**Q: The vendor doesn't speak the language on my phone. Can I skip?**
Complete as much as you can by observation. Skip the education fields
if you can't communicate. Record the issue in the free-text notes.

**Q: Can I take photos without the vendor's permission?**
No. Always ask first. If the vendor refuses, skip the photo and record
the reason.

## Photo & form

**Q: The MTN card is dirty / damaged. Can I still use it?**
Minor dirt is fine. Creases, tears, or missing corners mean the card
can't serve as a color reference. Ask your LLO manager for a
replacement.

**Q: What if GPS lock takes too long?**
Wait 30 seconds. If no lock, step outside to open sky. If still nothing,
record the delivery manually with a note — it will be flagged for
review.

**Q: I hit my daily cap. Can I keep collecting?**
No — the app blocks submissions once the cap is reached. Come back
tomorrow or move to a market that hasn't hit its 5/day cap.

## Payment

**Q: When do I get paid?**
Per verified delivery, on the normal Connect payment schedule. A
delivery is verified when the photo, GPS, and required form fields are
all present and the GPS is inside the operating bounding box.

**Q: One of my deliveries was rejected. Why?**
Usually: GPS outside bounding box, photo missing the MTN card, or a
required field left blank. Your LLO manager can show you the rejection
reason.

## Support

**Q: Who do I contact if I have a problem in the field?**
Your LLO manager first. They escalate to the ACE onboarding email if
needed.
